title: Green & Spiegel Recognized by Lexology Index: Global Immigration 2026 - Green & Spiegel
content:
## Green & Spiegel Recognized by Lexology Index: Global Immigration 2026

## Green & Spiegel Recognized by Lexology Index: Global Immigration 2026
Green & Spiegel is pleased to announce that three of the firm’s Senior Partners have been recognized as among the highest-ranked lawyers in the Lexology Index: Global Immigration 2026 (formerly Who’s Who Legal ). Congratulations to Stephen W. Green, Evan J. Green, and Shoshana T. Green on this prestigious achievement, which highlights their exceptional contributions to the field of corporate immigration law.
- Stephen W. Green and Evan J. Green have been ranked as Thought Leaders
- Shoshana T. Green has been ranked as Highly Recommended
For more than 25 years, Lexology Index has been one of the most trusted resources for in-house counsel, government officials, agencies, and legal practitioners seeking leading lawyers in specific practice areas and jurisdictions. Each year, Lexology Index honours individuals who excel in its independent research process, which is informed by feedback from clients, peers, and distinguished private practitioners. Rankings for top lawyers are based on recommendations from leading experts in the relevant sector or industry, as well as input from corporate counsel and other clients who have worked closely with the nominees.
For more information, please visit: https://www.lexology.com/index/report/immigration/rankings?f=17162
- Stephen W. Green Stephen Green is one of the two Managing Partners at Green and Spiegel and is Certified as a Specialist in Immigration Law by The Law Society of Ontario. View Author Bio
Stephen Green is one of the two Managing Partners at Green and Spiegel and is Certified as a Specialist in Immigration Law by The Law Society of Ontario.
- Evan J. Green Evan Green is one of the two Senior Partners at Green and Spiegel and is Certified as a Specialist in Immigration Law by The Law Society of Ontario. View Author Bio
Evan Green is one of the two Senior Partners at Green and Spiegel and is Certified as a Specialist in Immigration Law by The Law Society of Ontario.
- Shoshana T. Green Shoshana Green is a partner at Green and Spiegel LLP in Toronto. Shoshana has been practicing immigration law for more than 20 years, and has extensive experience in all areas of Canadian immigration. View Author Bio
Shoshana Green is a partner at Green and Spiegel LLP in Toronto. Shoshana has been practicing immigration law for more than 20 years, and has extensive experience in all areas of Canadian immigration.
